title: Sprint Contract
description: Operational contract for a sprint within a delivery phase, capturing goal, committed items, capacity, and acceptance criteria.

id.description: Unique identifier for this sprint contract (e.g. SC-4-001)

sprint_number.description: Sequential sprint number within the project

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this sprint occurs

goal.description: The sprint goal — a single clear statement of what the team aims to achieve

committed_items.description: List of backlog item IDs or titles committed to this sprint

capacity_points.description: Team capacity in story points for this sprint

velocity_actual.description: Actual story points completed by end of sprint

end_date.description: Sprint end date / planned end date (ISO 8601)

acceptance_criteria_complete.description: Whether all acceptance criteria for committed items have been verified

retrospective_id.description: Reference to the retrospective record for this sprint

health_record_id.description: Reference to the sprint health record

notes.description: Additional notes or context for this sprint
